Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.FailoverExecution

Packages that use FailoverExecution
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core
Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience
Resilience4j integration for failover method execution.

  • Uses of FailoverExecution in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return FailoverExecution
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverExecution<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverExecution(FailoverHandler<Object> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler)
    Registers BasicFailoverExecution, active when failover.type=basic (the default).
    FailoverExecution<Object>
    ResilienceFailoverExecutionAutoConfiguration.failoverExecution(FailoverHandler<Object> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler, io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerRegistry circuitBreakerRegistry)
    Registers ResilienceFailoverExecution backed by the application's CircuitBreakerRegistry.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type FailoverExecution
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverAspect<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverAspect(FailoverExecution<Object> failoverExecution)
    Registers the AOP aspect that intercepts @Failover-annotated methods.

  • Uses of FailoverExecution in com.societegenerale.failover.core

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core that implement FailoverExecution
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicFailoverExecution<T>
    Basic FailoverExecution that invokes the supplier, stores the result on success, and attempts recovery via the FailoverHandler on any exception.

  • Uses of FailoverExecution in com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience that implement FailoverExecution
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ResilienceFailoverExecution<T>
    BasicFailoverExecution extension that wraps each supplier with a Resilience4j CircuitBreaker named after the failover point.
